March 18, 2026 license investigation found that the live DigitalOcean app specs were missing VITE_AG_GRID_LICENSE_KEY even though .env.local had the key; staging deployment b0f31972-127c-4906-b2f2-a53cdb8d89be and production deployment 36eb5bb9-5678-47ea-9d61-eb940241d951 now carry the fix

Fresh staging build build-mmwdxj4j proved the route renders again but AG Grid still reports License Key Not Found, which traced the remaining blocker to Dockerfile build args not forwarding VITE_AG_GRID_LICENSE_KEY into the Vite build stage

Staging proof command pnpm proof:staging:orders-runtime:g2 now captures queue-route license health plus document-route duplicate, quick-add, delete, Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Shift+Enter, and Escape evidence under output/playwright/orders-runtime-g2/2026-03-18/

March 18, 2026 adversarial review kept SALE-ORD-019, SALE-ORD-020, SALE-ORD-021, SALE-ORD-022, SALE-ORD-029, SALE-ORD-031, and SALE-ORD-035 in partial because the current clipboard and failure-mode packet is still contradictory or not safely repeatable

A later March 18 isolated rerun on build-mmwp9o9e proved the Add Item focus repair is live, showed browser clipboard readback working again (`3\n4`), and rejected the earlier two-cell-range blocker because the correct live signal is `selectionSummaryBeforeValidPaste: 2 selected cells · 2 rows in scope`, not the focused-cell state alone

The repaired G2 harness now records `validPasteUsedTwoCellRange: true`, `validPasteMethod: keyboard`, and `quantityValuesAfterValidPaste: [3,4]`, which proves deterministic rectangular keyboard paste on staging without reopening a runtime defect theory

The same isolated rerun restored the accepted row-op baseline with `quickAddDelta: 1` and `deleteReturnedToBaseline: true`, so TER-795 remains blocked only on the remaining fill-handle, sort/filter-safe targeting, and failure-bundle proof rather than on TER-796 regression evidence

March 20, 2026 G5 surfacing implementation: CSS editable/locked cell cues, toast feedback for blocked edits, KeyboardHintBar integration for queue and document surfaces, per-surface affordance matrix via PowersheetGrid affordances prop, workflow context bar on document surface.
